evals.prompt: Triage issue #42, decide whether it is ready for an agent, and leave the right tracker update.
evals.expected_output: Reads the issue, comments, labels, and relevant code context, verifies the claim, recommends a category/state, and posts either questions, a brief, or a wontfix explanation with the AI triage disclaimer.
assertions: Starts tracker comments with the required AI triage disclaimer.
Applies exactly one category role and one state role or flags conflicts.
Checks redundancy and prior rejection before recommending ready-for-agent.
Writes specific reporter questions instead of vague requests for more information.
